install_fields.label: Redirect URI (optional)
install_fields.help: OAuth callback URL. Leave blank to use the default.

methods.name: Install / Validate Credentials
methods.description: Validate that client_id and client_secret are present. Returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE with reason.

methods.name: Generate Authorization URL
methods.description: Return the Google OAuth2 authorization URL for the analytics.readonly scope. User visits this URL to grant consent.

methods.name: Health Check
methods.description: Call list_accounts() to verify Bearer token is valid. Returns account count in message.

methods.name: Sync
methods.description: Run sessions + users report for last 30 days on the configured property_id. Paginates all rows (offset/limit). Normalizes each row to a ConnectorDocument.

methods.name: List Accounts
methods.description: Return all GA accounts accessible by the authenticated user.

methods.name: List Properties
methods.description: Return all GA4 properties under a given account.

methods.name: Run Report
methods.description: Run a GA4 Data API report for a property with given dimensions, metrics, and date range.

methods.name: Get Property Metadata
methods.description: Return GA4 property metadata including all available dimensions and metrics.

apis.name: Sync
apis.description: Sync sessions + users report for the last 30 days.

apis.name: List Accounts
apis.description: Return all GA accounts accessible by the authenticated user.

apis.name: List Properties
apis.description: Return all GA4 properties under the given account.

apis.name: Run Report
apis.description: Run a GA4 Data API report and return the raw response.
